hero.title: About Company
hero.description: Aqlant LLP provides engineering, technical and IT solutions: software development, design and installation of low-voltage and power networks, corporate networks and infrastructure, plus professional training in these fields.

about.title: Our Activities
about.paragraph1: Aqlant LLP delivers end-to-end projects to equip facilities: from software development and system integration to communication networks, low-voltage and power solutions. We operate in Kazakhstan and maintain high standards of quality, safety and regulatory compliance.
about.paragraph2: The company holds licenses and certificates confirming competence in information technology, electrical installation and low-voltage systems. Our specialists have experience implementing solutions for businesses and organizations of various scales.
about.paragraph3: We guarantee quality, reliability and transparency in cooperation, compliance with regulatory requirements and standards of the Republic of Kazakhstan, and an individual approach to each project.

test.testFailed: Test not passed. Please try again.
test.testCompletedSuccess: Test completed. Protocol created and sent for EC signing.
test.completionDescription: Enter the confirmation code from SMS to complete the test
test.protocolCreated: Exam protocol has been created and sent for EC commission approval. After the protocol is signed, you will receive a certificate.
test.smsVerificationRequired: SMS verification is required to complete the test.
test.protocolInfo: Exam protocol has been created and sent for EC commission approval. After the protocol is signed, you will receive a certificate.
test.retryInfo: You have attempts remaining. We recommend reviewing the material before the next attempt.
test.question: Question
test.videoRecordingNotice: Your test session is being recorded on video. Please do not close the browser tab.
test.videoRequiredMessage: Video recording is required to take this test. Please allow camera access to continue.
test.videoRequiredForSubmission: Video recording is required to complete this test.
test.videoRecordingError: Error stopping video recording. The test cannot be completed.
test.excellentPassMessage: Congratulations! You passed the test excellently. This test will no longer be available for retakes.
test.testTerminated: Test terminated early due to rule violations
test.warningMessage: A test rule violation has been detected. After 3 warnings, the test will be automatically terminated.
test.tabSwitchWarning: Switching tabs or minimizing the browser window is not allowed
test.fullscreenExitWarning: Leaving fullscreen during the test is not allowed
test.faceMissingPausedToast: Your face is not visible in the frame
test.faceMissingToastNoPenalty: This is a reminder, not a violation: your warning count does not go up and there is no penalty to your result.
test.faceMissingPauseBody: The camera cannot see your face. Stay centered in the frame with good lighting.
test.faceMissingPauseHint: The timer and answers resume automatically when your face is visible again. This does not count toward the three-strike warning limit.
test.faceMissingSubmitBlocked: Bring your face into the frame first (reminder only, not a violation).
test.faceBadPosePausedToast: Look at the camera; do not turn away
test.faceBadPosePauseBody: Face the camera directly. Turning away triggers only this reminder—no strike and no change to the three-warning limit.
test.faceBadPoseSubmitBlocked: Look at the camera first (reminder only, not a violation).
test.facePoseWarning: Look straight at the camera; do not turn away
test.faceMismatchWarning: Face does not match your profile photo
test.faceProctoringHint: Keep your face in frame and look at the camera—automatic comparison with your profile photo is running.
test.profilePhotoRequiredBody: This test uses camera video recording. Upload a face photo in your profile—it is used for identity checks during the exam.
test.protectionRulesHint: During the test, restrictions apply: no copying, other tabs, screenshots or screen capture (within browser limits). Fullscreen is recommended—leaving fullscreen counts as a violation. Video recording (if enabled) and your organization’s rules also apply.
test.fullscreenUnavailable: Fullscreen is not available in this browser. You can continue the test.
test.recordingRequired: This test requires recording (camera and/or screen).
test.screenShareEnded: Screen sharing stopped. The test will be ended.
test.screenShareEndedReason: Screen sharing was stopped by the user
test.screenRequiredForSubmission: Screen recording is required to complete this test.
test.screenRecordingError: Error stopping screen recording. The test cannot be completed.
test.screenRecordingNotice: Do not stop screen sharing until you finish the test.

recordingSetup.title: Recording setup
recordingSetup.cameraBody: This test requires webcam recording. Allow access to camera and microphone.
recordingSetup.screenBody: Select a screen or window to share. Do not stop sharing until you finish the test.
recordingSetup.screenPickBrowserTab: Please select the browser tab with the test (not the entire screen and not a window).
recordingSetup.permissionDenied: Camera or screen access was denied. Allow recording in your browser settings.
recordingSetup.startError: Could not start recording. Please try again.
recordingSetup.inlineBodyBoth: Click below: the browser will ask for camera and microphone, then for sharing the test tab. Choose the browser tab, not the full screen.
recordingSetup.inlineBodyScreen: Click below and in the picker choose the browser tab with this test (not full screen or a window).
recordingSetup.inlineBodyCamera: Click below and allow access to the camera and microphone for recording.

vacancies.noVacancies: There are currently no open vacancies

info.title: Didn't find a suitable vacancy?

support.title: Support
support.description: Contact us if you have any questions

faq1.question: How to start learning?
faq1.answer: Go to "My Courses" section and select a course to start learning. After the administrator assigns a course, it will appear in your personal cabinet.

faq2.question: How to take a test?
faq2.answer: Select an available test in the "Tests" section and click "Start Testing". You have a limited number of attempts to pass the test.

faq3.question: Where to get a certificate?
faq3.answer: After successfully completing the course and passing the exam, the certificate will be available in the "Documents" section of your personal cabinet.

faq4.question: What to do if technical problems occur?
faq4.answer: Contact our support service by phone or email listed above. We will help solve the problems that have arisen.
